description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on workflow dispatch, push to non-version tags on the master branch, and pull requests to the master and feature/* branches. The workflow should run two jobs, generic and rust, on an ubuntu-latest environment. The generic job checks out the repository and runs lint and extended lint scripts. The rust job runs in a defi/ain-builder container, checks out the repository, populates the environment, sets up dependencies, and runs various lint and build checks.
